title: We signed before we landed
comment: We were still in Geneva when Wanjiru sent the walkthrough videos. We picked the Runda house on a Tuesday, signed that Friday, and moved straight in from the airport. No serviced apartment, no three months in limbo.
author: Claire Doucet

title: They told us not to take a house
comment: The one we loved had a generator that hadn't run in a year and a landlord who wouldn't fix it. They told us plainly. That cost them a commission and won them our trust — and every referral we've made since.
author: Michael Brandt

title: The school run decided it
comment: We were set on Karen until Aisha showed us what the ISK run actually looks like at 7am. We moved to Rosslyn instead and our daughter walks to school. Nobody else would have talked us out of it.
author: Sarah Whitfield

title: Got our full deposit back
comment: David insisted on a written inventory with photographs at check-in. Two years later the landlord tried to bill us for the garden. The inventory settled it in one email.
author: Tomás Herrera
